title: Select A Documented Information Area From The Hospital HMI Maintenance Menu
summary: Use the Hospital HMI Maintenance Menu to select one of the four documented information-area buttons: 2.1 Manual Control, 2.2 IO Diagnostics, 2.3 Persistent Variables, or 2.4 Default.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when access is needed to one of the documented information areas available from the Hospital HMI Maintenance Menu.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to describe destination screen contents or resulting behavior after button selection unless supported by additional source material.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Access the Hospital HMI Maintenance Menu, identify the available documented buttons, and select the required information area.

safety_notes: This runbook is limited to HMI menu selection only.
The source does not provide authorization for broader actions beyond selecting one of the documented Maintenance Menu buttons.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Hospital HMI Maintenance Menu screen
Ability to interact with the HMI
Figure 4-38 or equivalent documented Maintenance Menu reference

access_required: Access to the Hospital HMI Maintenance Menu screen
Ability to interact with the HMI
system_preconditions: The Hospital HMI Maintenance Menu screen is open or viewable.
external_references: Figure 4-38, Hospital HMI Maintenance Menu Screen

visual_references.description: Hospital HMI Maintenance Menu screen showing the four documented maintenance access buttons.
Referenced destination screen artifact for the 2.2 IO Diagnostics entry.
Referenced destination screen artifact for the 2.4 Default entry.
Hospital HMI Main Menu artifact that may help orient navigation to the Maintenance Menu.

steps.title: Open or view the Maintenance Menu
steps.purpose: Ensure the correct Hospital HMI screen is available before selecting an information area.
steps.instruction: Open or view the Hospital HMI Maintenance Menu screen.
steps.expected_result: The Hospital HMI Maintenance Menu screen is visible.
steps.healthy_condition: The Maintenance Menu screen is displayed and the maintenance access buttons are visible.
steps.failure_condition: The Maintenance Menu screen is not visible or cannot be accessed.

actions.label: View Maintenance Menu
actions.exact_action: Open or view the Hospital HMI Maintenance Menu screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Hospital HMI Maintenance Menu screen and its available maintenance access buttons.
Main Menu reference showing Maintenance Menu access if screen orientation is needed.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the Hospital HMI Maintenance Menu screen cannot be opened or viewed.

source_evidence.text: Open or view the Hospital HMI Maintenance Menu screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Maintenance Menu" has four buttons that allow access to a variety of information: 2.1 Manual Control, 2.2 IO Diagnostics, 2.3 Persistent Variables, 2.4 Default.

steps.title: Identify the available documented buttons
steps.purpose: Confirm which documented information areas are available from the Maintenance Menu.
steps.instruction: Identify the available buttons on the menu: "2.1 Manual Control," "2.2 IO Diagnostics," "2.3 Persistent Variables," and "2.4 Default."
steps.expected_result: The four documented Maintenance Menu buttons are identified on the screen.
steps.healthy_condition: All four documented buttons are present and readable on the Maintenance Menu.
steps.failure_condition: One or more required documented buttons are missing, unreadable, or do not match the documented menu entries.

actions.label: Identify menu buttons
actions.exact_action: Identify the available buttons on the menu: "2.1 Manual Control," "2.2 IO Diagnostics," "2.3 Persistent Variables," and "2.4 Default."

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Figure 4-38 showing the four selectable buttons on the Maintenance Menu.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the required button is not present on the Maintenance Menu.

source_evidence.text: Identify the available buttons on the menu: "2.1 Manual Control," "2.2 IO Diagnostics," "2.3 Persistent Variables," and "2.4 Default."

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Maintenance Menu" has four buttons that allow access to a variety of information: 2.1 Manual Control, 2.2 IO Diagnostics, 2.3 Persistent Variables, 2.4 Default.

steps.title: Select the required information area button
steps.purpose: Enter the documented information area needed from the Maintenance Menu.
steps.instruction: Select the documented button for the information area you need to access.
steps.expected_result: One of the four documented information-area buttons is selected from the Maintenance Menu.
steps.healthy_condition: The intended documented button is selected from the Maintenance Menu.
steps.failure_condition: The required button cannot be selected or is not available on the Maintenance Menu.

actions.label: Select information area
actions.exact_action: Select the documented button for the information area you need to access.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Maintenance Menu buttons used to select the desired information area.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the required button is not present on the Maintenance Menu.
Stop if additional behavior beyond button selection would need to be described without source support.

source_evidence.text: Select the documented button for the information area you need to access.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Maintenance Menu" has four buttons that allow access to a variety of information: 2.1 Manual Control, 2.2 IO Diagnostics, 2.3 Persistent Variables, 2.4 Default.

steps.title: Verify and record the selected information area
steps.purpose: Confirm the selection was made from the Maintenance Menu and document which information area was chosen.
steps.instruction: Verify that the selection was made from the Maintenance Menu screen and record which documented information area was chosen.
steps.expected_result: The selected documented information area is noted.
steps.healthy_condition: The chosen information area is recorded as one of the four documented Maintenance Menu entries.
steps.failure_condition: The selected information area cannot be confirmed or the chosen entry is not one of the documented Maintenance Menu buttons.

actions.label: Verify selection source
actions.exact_action: Verify that the selection was made from the Maintenance Menu screen.

actions.label: Record chosen information area
actions.exact_action: Record which documented information area was chosen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Maintenance Menu screen used as the source of the selected documented information area.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if confirmation would require describing destination screen contents or resulting behavior not supported by the source.

source_evidence.text: Verify that the selection was made from the Maintenance Menu screen and record which documented information area was chosen.
Source supports that the four buttons allow access to information, but does not provide the resulting screens or confirmation details after selection.

success_criteria: A documented information area is selected from the Hospital HMI Maintenance Menu using one of the four available buttons.
The chosen entry is one of the documented buttons: 2.1 Manual Control, 2.2 IO Diagnostics, 2.3 Persistent Variables, or 2.4 Default.
healthy_conditions: The Hospital HMI Maintenance Menu is visible.
The four documented buttons are present on the menu.
The required documented button can be selected.
The selected information area is recorded.
failure_conditions: The Hospital HMI Maintenance Menu cannot be viewed.
The required button is not present on the Maintenance Menu.
The selected entry cannot be confirmed as one of the documented Maintenance Menu buttons.
Additional destination-screen behavior would need to be described without source support.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the required button is not present on the Maintenance Menu.
Do not describe the destination screen contents or resulting behavior beyond button selection unless supported by additional source material.
